checklist.title: Contract conformance
checklist.description: Does the diff implement the locked desired_behavior? Is any acceptance criterion only vacuously satisfied?

checklist.title: Test gaming
checklist.description: Were tests weakened, skipped, over-mocked, or written to pass trivially? Look for semantic gaming the static IntegritySentinel probes miss.

checklist.title: Hidden behavior and scope
checklist.description: Any changes beyond the contract scope, dead switches, surprising side effects, secrets, or network calls?

checklist.title: Requirement misread
checklist.description: Does the implementation solve a plausible-but-wrong interpretation of the requirement rather than the requirement itself?

checklist.title: Robustness at the seams
checklist.description: Error paths and boundary conditions the locked tests do not cover. Advisory only: needs_rework at most, never a silent pass.
